title: gratiola officinalis f. meonantha
intro: Gratiola officinalis f. meonantha is a variety of the selfheal plant, a flowering perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Gratiola officinalis f. meonantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate anxiety and stress, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
